name: Agent editor Skills tab lists workspace skills for a seeded agent
description: Opens the seeded Test Quality Reviewer agent, switches to its Skills tab (the editor tab button, disambiguated by role from the sidebar Skills link) and confirms the linking UI renders: the order hint and the seeded skill rows. Exercises GET /agents/:id/skills + GET /skills behind the agent editor Skills tab (Phase 6).

steps.label: switch to the Skills tab (not the sidebar link)
